answers: Student loans fund education — borrow now, repay after graduation. Federal loans (government) vs private loans (banks).
Repayment: starts 6 months after graduation usually. Income-driven plans adjust payments based on salary.
Tips: borrow only what you need, understand interest rates, make payments during school if possible, and explore forgiveness programs.
Student loan ki: porshar jonno taka rin newa. Graduation er pore forht dite hoy. Shomoy moto dile credit valo thake.
